name: Grants, Procurement & Enforcement
description: Horizon Europe grant management, infringement procedures (Arts. 258–260 TFEU), and public procurement under the Financial Regulation.

skills.description: Personalise this plugin to your programme, member state portfolio, or procurement type
Horizon Europe MGA management, payment assessment, financial corrections
Arts. 258–260 TFEU procedure — EU Pilot, LFN, RO, CJEU referral, Art. 260 penalties
FR 2018/1046 procurement — framework contracts, tender evaluation, award decisions
Draft Art. 258 TFEU Letters of Formal Notice — non-transposition, incorrect transposition, misapplication
Track and assess directive transposition across 27 MS — status table, conformity, escalation
Art. 258–260 TFEU infringement assessment — type classification, procedural stage, penalty estimate
Art. 258(2) TFEU Reasoned Opinion — rebuttal of member state observations, maintained allegations, RO drafting
Grant audit preparation and response — ECA/IAS on-the-spot checks, contradictory procedure, rebuttal notes
Grant agreement amendments — budget reallocation, partner withdrawal, period extension, force majeure
Tender evaluation — exclusion/selection/award criteria scoring, ALT assessment, evaluation report, debrief letters
OLAF referral — fraud indicators, Art. 8 Reg. 883/2013 notification, payment suspension, parallel procedure rules
Direct award justification — urgency, sole source, follow-on services, FR Art. 164 exception assessment
